name: uilayouts-progressive-carousel
title: Progressive Carousel
author: UI LAYOUT
description: Provides direct slide selection with optional timed progress and a controlled pause state.

changes: Added the client boundary and changed the root-alias utility import to ../../lib/utils.
Made autoplay opt-in with autoPlay defaulting to false and added a controlled paused prop for a stable external pause/resume control.
Paused opted-in autoplay while offscreen, hidden, hovered, or keyboard-focused while allowing an explicit fast-forward selection to complete, and stopped autoplay for reduced motion.
Fixed fast-forward progress timing and made reduced-motion slide selection immediate.
Marked the visual progress fill decorative and exposed the active control with aria-pressed.
Retained only the upstream cn helper and removed site configuration, URLs, and unrelated timing helpers.

modifications.change: Added a client boundary and local import, made autoplay opt-in, exposed a controlled paused prop, corrected fast-forward timing, paused autoplay when hidden or engaged without blocking direct selection, added reduced-motion behavior, and clarified control semantics.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied carousel portable, prevent unsolicited or unstoppable motion, and give callers a stable pause/resume control contract.

modifications.change: Removed unrelated site configuration and timing helpers, retaining cn only.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied support closure minimal and remove site URLs.
